meta.title: Host Cleaners Bulgaria
meta.description: Email-confirmed turnover-cleaning profiles for Bulgarian short-term rental hosts.

landing.heroHostHeading: Find a marketplace-active cleaner near you
landing.heroHostCopy: Browse trusted cleaners across Bulgaria. Filter by city and district, then open a profile to see ratings and reviews.
landing.heroCleanerCopy: See how many hosts are hiring in your area and join the email-confirmed marketplace — free.

login.heading: Log in
login.subtitle: Use the email and password from your signup request.
login.errorCredentials: Check your email and password and try again.

recovery.restoredNotice: For your security, account details, passwords, and email verification are not saved. Re-enter them to continue; your account type and service-area choices will be restored later.

error.emailDomain: Email domain must include a valid ending (for example .com or .bg).
error.emailDomainHyphen: Email domain labels cannot start or end with a hyphen.
error.emailDomainChars: Email domain labels can only use letters, numbers, and hyphens.
error.passwordWeak: Password must be at least 8 characters long and contain at least one letter, one number, and one special character.
error.codeNotSent: Could not send the confirmation code. Try again.
error.codeNotSentNetwork: Could not send the confirmation code. Check your connection and try again.
error.createFallback: Could not create the account. Check your details and try again.
error.createNetwork: Could not create the account. Check your connection and try again.

error.verifyFailed: Could not verify this email. Request a new code and try again.
error.verifyNetwork: Could not verify the code. Check your connection and try again.
error.resendFailed: Could not send a new code. Try again.
error.resendNetwork: Could not send a new code. Check your connection and try again.

notice.verificationDisabled: Email verification is disabled. You can continue.
notice.codeSent: A new confirmation code was sent.

host.label: Host
host.description: Post cleaning jobs for your properties.

cleaner.label: Cleaner
cleaner.description: Join the network and find cleaning jobs.

agency.label: Agency
agency.description: Manage teams and assign cleaning jobs.

error.birthDateAge: You must be at least 18 years old to sign up as a cleaner.

error.chooseFromDropdown: Choose a language from the dropdown.

introduction.heading: Introduce yourself
introduction.label: Your introduction
introduction.placeholder:
Hosts read descriptions to find the best match.
Share your experience, work style, and what makes you reliable.
Make your profile feel clear and trustworthy.

profilePhoto.heading: Add a profile photo
profilePhoto.subtitle: A clear profile photo helps hosts trust your profile faster. You can skip this and add it later.

error.invalidFile: Please choose a valid image file.
error.tooLarge: Please choose an image up to 2 MB.
error.openFailed: Could not open this image. Please choose another file.
error.readFailed: Could not read this image. Try another file.

cropModal.title: Adjust your profile photo
cropModal.hint: Drag to center your photo. Use zoom to crop tighter or wider.

error.applyCrop: Could not apply crop. Please try again.

emptyBioPrompt.heading: Improve your matching by 53%!
emptyBioPrompt.body: A short bio helps hosts understand a cleaner's experience, reliability, and work style before they choose who to work with. You can add one now, or create the account and update it later.

emptyPhotoPrompt.heading: Users with profile pictures are 78% more likely to find a job.
emptyPhotoPrompt.body: Hosts want reliable people in their homes. A clear photo makes your profile feel trustworthy and helps you get picked faster.

wrongRole.heading: Wrong dashboard
wrongRole.body: This dashboard is for property owners.

host.pendingBanner: Marketplace access is pending. You can browse while the configured contact requirements are completed.

errors.network: Network error. Check that the backend is running.
errors.saveAccount: Could not save your account details.
errors.saveHostProfile: Could not save your host profile.

pending.emptyHint: Cleaners will appear here once they apply to your open jobs.

active.title: Active assignments
active.emptyHint: Accept a cleaner application to create an assignment.

reviews.title: Reviews received
reviews.empty: No reviews yet — ratings appear after a completed job.

openJobs.emptyHint: Publish a draft job to start receiving applications.

jobs.title: Jobs & Calendar
jobs.notApproved: Jobs are available after your account is approved.

firstProp.heading: Add your first property
firstProp.body: Set it up once, then post a turnover cleaning in under a minute — cleaners with active marketplace access in your area can apply right away.

account.title: Host profile
account.notesPlaceholder: Anything cleaners should know about working with you…

propForm.photosHint: JPG, PNG, WebP — up to 10 MB each; multiple files allowed.
propForm.invalidPhotoType: Choose a JPEG, PNG, or WebP image.
propForm.photoTooLarge: Choose an image up to 10 MB.

icsModal.title: Import from Airbnb
icsModal.step1Subtitle: Upload your Airbnb .ics file to create cleaning jobs automatically.
icsModal.step2Subtitle: Found {count} {count, plural, one {reservation} other {reservations}}. Select the ones to import.
icsModal.dropZone: Click to choose file or drop here
icsModal.fileHint: Airbnb → Calendar → Export calendar → download the .ics file and upload it here.
icsModal.urlUnavailable: Calendar-link import is unavailable during the pilot. Download the .ics file from Airbnb, then upload it here.
icsModal.errorFileTooLarge: Choose an .ics file up to 1 MB.

icsModal.errorNoReservations: No reservations found. Blocked dates are excluded automatically.

wrongRole.body: This panel is reserved for marketplace administrators.

decisionDialog.body: Apply this decision to {email}. Existing safe history is preserved.
decisionDialog.notePrivacy: This note is restricted to authorized administrators and is never shown in public or ordinary user responses.

errors.reconcileFailed: Reconciliation could not advance this account.
errors.suspendFailed: Suspension failed — refresh the account state and try again.

errors.heading: Something went wrong
errors.body: Refresh the page or try the action again.

gates.hostsOnlyBody: The cleaner directory is available to hosts.

approved.title: {role} workspace
approved.body: Your stored account state permits marketplace tools for your role.

rejected.title: Account request rejected
rejected.body: Your signup request was not approved. Contact support if this looks incorrect.

suspended.title: Account suspended
suspended.body: Marketplace access is paused while an admin reviews the account.

pending.title: Contact requirements incomplete
pending.body: You can complete onboarding details while the configured contact requirements are completed.

nextStepCard.label: Next step
nextStepCard.agencyBody: Agency profiles can invite cleaners and assign accepted agency work after marketplace access becomes active.
nextStepCard.defaultBody: Profile details stay available while marketplace permissions are gated.

verificationStatus.title: Verification status
verificationStatus.interimPolicy: Pilot marketplace access currently uses an interim email contact-confirmation policy. Phone verification is planned and is not currently required.
verificationStatus.disclaimer: Email confirmation does not mean identity, references, an interview, or a trial job were checked.

cookieBanner.heading: Cookie choices
cookieBanner.body: Essential cookies keep login and security working. Analytics and marketing cookies stay off unless you allow them.

accountDeletionPanel.heading: Delete account
accountDeletionPanel.description: Permanently delete your account and related profile data. This action cannot be undone.
accountDeletionPanel.confirmSubtitle: This will delete {email} and sign you out immediately.
accountDeletionPanel.confirmBody: Accounts with active obligations cannot be deleted. Accounts with retained marketplace history are routed to support; that history is not removed by this action.

errors.activeObligations: Finish or cancel your active marketplace obligations before deleting your account.
errors.requiresSupport: Your marketplace history must be reviewed by support. Contact {channel} during {hours}. This is not an emergency service.
